---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---



```{r}

#WPO3

#--------Random intercept-------------------------------------------
library(lme4)
library(tidyverse)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(effectsize)
set.seed(11)

# Simulatie parameters
n_subjects <- 30  # aantal deelnemers
n_timepoints <- 6  # aantal meetmomenten
error_sd <- 7         # Residual SD
subject_sd <- 4       # Random intercept SD
fixed_slope <- 0.9    # Zwak effect tijd
Intercept <- 50 # grand mean


# Simuleer data
data1 <- tibble(
  subject_id = rep(1:n_subjects, each = n_timepoints),
  time = rep(1:n_timepoints, times = n_subjects),
  subject_effect = rep(rnorm(n_subjects, 0, subject_sd), each = n_timepoints),
  error = rnorm(n_subjects * n_timepoints, 0, error_sd),
  y = Intercept + subject_effect + fixed_slope * time + error
)

# Analyse
model1 <- lmer(y ~ 1 + time + (1 | subject_id), data = data1)
summary(model1)

# Bereken ICC
intercept_var <- as.numeric(VarCorr(model1)$subject_id[1,1])
residual_var <- attr(VarCorr(model1), "sc")^2

icc <- intercept_var / (intercept_var + residual_var)
print(paste("ICC:", round(icc, 2)))

print(cohens_f(model1))

# Visualisatie - ruwe data
ggplot(data1, aes(x = factor(time), y = y, color = subject_id, group = subject_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Ruwe data",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "Uitkomst")


# Visualisatie - effect
data1$fixed_effect_fit <- predict(model1)

ggplot(data1, aes(x = factor(time), y = fixed_effect_fit, group = subject_id, color = subject_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Fixed effects alleen (zonder random intercept)",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "Voorspelling op basis van fixed effects")

# Visualisatie - ruis
data1$ruis <- residuals(model1)

ggplot(data1, aes(x = factor(time), y = ruis, group = subject_id, color = subject_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "ruis",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "modelresiduen")

ruis_wide1 <- reshape(as.data.frame(data1)[, c("subject_id", "time", "ruis")], timevar = "time", idvar = "subject_id", direction = "wide")
library(reshape2)
ruis_long1 <- melt(ruis_wide1, id.vars = "subject_id", variable.name = "time", value.name = "ruis")

ggplot(ruis_long1, aes(x = time, y = subject_id, fill = ruis)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap van residuen per subject en tijdstip",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "Subject", fill = "Residu") +
  theme_minimal()

plot(ggplot(ruis_long1, aes(x = subject_id, y = ruis)) +   geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3) +   stat_summary(fun.data = mean_sdl, fun.args = list(mult = 2), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "red") +   labs(title = "Intra-subject variabiliteit", y = "Residu", x = "Subject") + theme_minimal())
plot(ggplot(ruis_long1, aes(x = time, y = ruis)) +   geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3) +   stat_summary(fun.data = mean_sdl, fun.args = list(mult = 2), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "red") +   labs(title = "Inter-subject variabiliteit", y = "Residu", x = "Time") + theme_minimal())

# modelvergelijking

model_random_int_ml <- lmer(y ~ time + (1 | subject_id), data = data1, REML = FALSE)
model_fixed_ml <- lm(y ~ time, data = data1)

AIC(model_fixed_ml, model_random_int_ml)

# #-----------------------Random slope + random intercept-----------------------------
set.seed(11)
# Simulatie parameters
n_subjects <- 25
n_timepoints <- 5
conditions <- c("A", "B")

# Simuleer data
data3 <- tibble(
  subject_id = rep(1:n_subjects, each = n_timepoints),
  time = rep(1:n_timepoints, times = n_subjects),
  condition = rep(sample(conditions, n_subjects, replace = TRUE),
                  each = n_timepoints),
  # Random intercept en slope
  subject_intercept = rep(rnorm(n_subjects, 0, 2), each = n_timepoints),
  subject_slope = rep(rnorm(n_subjects, 0, 3), each = n_timepoints),
  # Fixed effects
  condition_effect = ifelse(condition == "B", 1, 0),
  time_effect = 2,
  interaction_effect = ifelse(condition == "B", 0.5, 0) * time,
  # Random error
  error = rnorm(n_subjects * n_timepoints, 0, 3),
  # Response variabele
  y = 50 + subject_intercept +
    (time_effect + interaction_effect + subject_slope) * time +
    condition_effect + error
)

# Analyse
model3 <- lmer(y ~ condition + time + condition * time + (1 + time | subject_id), data = data3)
summary(model3)

intercept_var <- as.numeric(VarCorr(model3)$subject_id[1,1])
residual_var <- attr(VarCorr(model3), "sc")^2

icc <- intercept_var / (intercept_var + residual_var)
print(paste("ICC:", round(icc, 2)))

slope_var <- as.numeric(VarCorr(model3)$subject_id["time", "time"])
pseudo.icc <- slope_var / (slope_var + residual_var)
print(paste("ICC:", round(pseudo.icc, 2)))

# Visualisatie - data
ggplot(data3, aes(x = time, y = y, color = condition, group = subject_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = condition), method = "lm", size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Random slope model met fixed effects",
       x = "Tijd", y = "Uitkomst", color = "Conditie")

# Visualisatie - effect
data3$fixed_effect_fit <- predict(model3)

ggplot(data3, aes(x = factor(time), y = fixed_effect_fit, group = subject_id, color = condition)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = condition), method = "lm", size = 2) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Fixed effects alleen (zonder random intercept)",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "Voorspelling op basis van fixed effects")

# Visualisatie - ruis

data3$ruis <- residuals(model3)

ggplot(data3, aes(x = factor(time), y = ruis, group = subject_id, color = condition)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = condition), method = "lm", size = 2) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "modelresiduen",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "residu")

ruis_wide3 <- reshape(as.data.frame(data3)[, c("subject_id", "time", "ruis")], timevar = "time", idvar = "subject_id", direction = "wide")
ruis_long3 <- melt(ruis_wide3, id.vars = "subject_id", variable.name = "time", value.name = "ruis")

ggplot(ruis_long3, aes(x = time, y = subject_id, fill = ruis)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap van residuen per subject en tijdstip",
       x = "Tijdstip", y = "Subject", fill = "Residu") +
  theme_minimal()

plot(ggplot(ruis_long3, aes(x = subject_id, y = ruis)) +   geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3) +   stat_summary(fun.data = mean_sdl, fun.args = list(mult = 2), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "red") +   labs(title = "Intra-subject variabiliteit", y = "Residu", x = "Subject") + theme_minimal())
plot(ggplot(ruis_long3, aes(x = time, y = ruis)) +   geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3) +   stat_summary(fun.data = mean_sdl, fun.args = list(mult = 2), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "red") +   labs(title = "Inter-subject variabiliteit", y = "Residu", x = "Time") + theme_minimal())


# modelvergelijking

model_random_int_ml <- lmer(y ~ condition + time + condition * time + (1 | subject_id), data = data3, REML = FALSE)
model_random_slope_ml <- lmer(y ~ condition + time + condition * time + (1 + time | subject_id), data = data3, REML = FALSE)
model_fixed_ml <- lm(y ~ condition + time + condition * time, data = data3)

AIC(model_fixed_ml, model_random_int_ml, model_random_slope_ml)

```
